final:
module shift_register_2bit (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire reset,  
    input wire serial_in,  
    output reg [1:0] q  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin  
        if (reset) begin  
            q <= 2'b00;  
        end else begin  
            q <= {q[0], serial_in};  
        end  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (serial_in) begin
        q <= 2'b11;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
